summary: Smoke-tested the 4 new features (Gemini image gen, SAP Help search, Analyse-client-ready button, Export/download). Backend: all 3 critical endpoints PASS (auth 401 on unauthenticated, /api/sap-help returns 6 real help.sap.com results, /api/generate-image returns base64 image, ~10s). Frontend: SAP Help dialog works end-to-end (6 results, real URLs), Image Gen dialog works end-to-end (image rendered, download button visible), Analyse-client-ready button visible on assistant message in existing session and clickable, Export button triggers .md download (sap-copilot-chat-<ts>.md). One observation: on a brand-new session, the first assistant streaming response did not render in the UI within 60s even though backend POST /chat returned 200; same UI works fine on the existing 'Hi SAP' session, so likely a transient first-message streaming issue and not a blocker. Login endpoint returns 'token' (not 'access_token') — already handled by frontend.
passed: GET /api/sap-help?q=BAPI sales order -> 200, 6 results, real help.sap.com URLs, search_url present
POST /api/generate-image (no session_id) -> 200, image data URL (image/jpeg base64), ~10s
sap-help-trigger opens sap-help-dialog; search returns 6 sap-help-result-N cards with real https://help.sap.com URLs
image-gen-trigger opens image-gen-dialog; submitting prompt renders image-gen-result and shows image-gen-download
Existing chat session: analyze-client-ready-button visible on assistant message and clickable
download-chat-button triggers .md download with filename sap-copilot-chat-<ts>.md

failed.issue: After sending the first message in a freshly created session, the assistant reply did not render in the UI within 60s, so analyze-client-ready-button never appeared on that new session. Backend logs show POST /api/sessions/<id>/chat returned 200 OK.
failed.evidence: Screenshot showed only the user bubble; analyze button timeout. Backend log: 'POST /api/sessions/6652fd89-.../chat HTTP/1.1 200 OK'. The same UI fully works on the existing 'Hi SAP' session.

failed.issue: Could not verify copy-code-button / download-code-button — the assistant messages reached in this test did not contain ```code``` blocks (only formatted text), so count=0. Not a defect, just untested.
failed.evidence: copy-code-button count: 0, download-code-button count: 0 on 'Hi SAP' welcome message

action_items: Investigate first-message streaming render on a brand-new session: confirm SSE/stream parsing flushes the first delta to the message list even when the assistant message bubble has just been created.
Optionally seed a session with a code-heavy reply to manually verify copy-code-button and download-code-button data-testids in MessageBubble.
